mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.room, c.begin_date, c.end_date, c.master_id, c.subject, c.create_time, c.update_time, e.name AS master_name FROM clazz c LEFT JOIN emp e ON c.master_id = e.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clazz (name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, subject) VALUES (#{name}, #{room}, #{beginDate}, #{endDate}, #{masterId}, #{subject})
